Content Customization / Scheme Details H.activity:
- Prepare awareness presentation on schemes
- Translate into Hindi, Malayalam, Tamil
- Content QA & approval

Documentation & Consultation (Through Ph.activity:
- Set up dedicated helpline number
- Attend participant calls post-camp
- Record type of queries for documentation

Documentation & Reporting.activity:
- Share the list of documents required for each scheme with donor POC which can be shared with participants during mobilization
- Compile camp-wise MIS
- Prepare monthly progress updates
- Final consolidated report for donor

IT Platform to Capture Beneficiary Data.activity:
- Develop data template
- Capture beneficiary details at camp
- Ensure accuracy and validation
- Maintain backend access and data security

Laptop, Projector & Internet on Rent.activity:
- Arrange 1 laptop and projector for all 20 camps
- Ensure backup internet/dongle availability
- Coordinate renting and maintenance

Manpower (Team Lead, Expert, Operations.activity: - Assign project manager, operations supervisor, coordinators, MIS person

- Develop month-wise deployment plan
- Ensure attendance, travel, reporting compliance
- Oversight of quality, MIS, donor updates

Participant Certificates.activity:
- Coordinate with martketing team for certificate design
- Marketing team to design certificate and share for donor approval
- Take donor approval on final certificate design

- Print certificates 
- Distribute certificate to all enrolled participants during camp
- Take certificate received acknowledgement

Post-Awareness Survey, Analysis & Report.activity:
- Coordinate and prepare post awareness survey questionnaire
- Share the questionnaire with the project coordinators with instructions to get the response of all participants

- Conduct post-awareness survey at camp
- Share the survey data with the impact assessment team for analysis
- Impact Team to prepare survey reports
- Impact Team to prepare end of project impact report

Printing & Stationery & Training Materia.activity:
- Pring forms, any other material required for training
- Procure stationery (pens, registers, markers)

Training.activity:
- Conduct 20 awareness sessions
- Manage participant flow & seating
- Ensure smooth delivery using PPT
- Maintain attendance & enrolment support

Travel of Staff.activity: - plan travel for coordinators & team per camp- Local transport arrangements
